Your Grade‑A list,
warmed before you ask.

Prepared for David Blaza & David · Sixty Seconds · figures illustrative, not claims
WHERE YOU ARE NOW
A perfect list. No warm way in.
You've built the Grade‑A list. The component makers, not their customers. The hard part most tools get wrong. But getting to them is still the problem.
Email
Dead. You tried it long ago. It hits junk and spam.
Cold calls
Blocked on sight. Nobody wants the unannounced call.
AI SDRs
Tested in Q3 and Q4. Couldn't tell a connector maker from Boeing. Disastrous.
The risk
Touch the A‑list cold and you burn the name before they ever click.
Problem first, product last. Your words, and we agree.
THE PRINCIPLE
It's not scale. It's personalisation.
Everyone blocks the obvious sell. The ones that slip through don't feel like selling. So we earn trust first, then ask. Five to eleven touches, not one.
Live in their feed
Paid LinkedIn impressions they can't unsubscribe from. Cents to reach a Grade‑A name, every day, until they engage.
Earn the click, then keep it
A video that feels like a Loom, made for one name. Get the click. Retain the click. Then earn the call.
Never burn the A‑list
Warm a B‑list first. Find the message that works. Only then go near the names that matter.
THE ENGINE
Three channels. One warm path to the call.
Built on a list we've already cut to the right people. Each channel feeds the next, and every watch, scroll and click lands back in your CRM.
01
Personalised video
A Loom‑style AI video per prospect. The quick win, 200 ready to send in two weeks.
The fast start
02
Paid feed + document
Pay to live in their feed. A gated industry report as the hook. Capture the curious, retarget the rest.
The warm‑up
03
Organic brand
Your face, everywhere. We run both founders' profiles like a media team. People buy you, not the logo.
The long game
Underneath it all: the list, already built. 25 matched distributors, the right decision‑maker found at each.

CHANNEL 01 · THE QUICK WIN
A video made for one name. At scale.
Generated from each prospect's profile, dressed in your brand, their name on the thumbnail. It feels like a Loom you recorded at 11pm. It's an AI avatar. They can't tell.
Sample · for Gerard, Extreme Components
“Hey Gerard, we're opening Lassi to our first 100 distributors. It answers the part‑search and support questions your engineers field every week. Fifteen minutes to show you, and you'd be our first case study.”
Lassi · made for Extreme Components
Gerard
Your engineers' time back. Watch how.

$2,000200 personalised videos, live in 14 days
CHANNEL 02 · WARM THE FEED
Pay to live in their feed.
LinkedIn is an ad platform almost nobody uses well. Upload the list and your content lands on their feed every day until they engage. They can't unsubscribe. A gated industry report turns the curious into known prospects.
1
Upload the list of names you want
2
Serve content to their feed, daily
3
Gate the report behind name + email
4
Known prospect, then retarget
$65+
per 1,000 impressions to the exact people you pick. The smaller and tighter the list, the higher it goes.
$6+
to get a top‑tier prospect to click. A niche audience sits higher again.
Warm
not blocked, not unsubscribed, not burnt
This is where your A‑list is finally allowed in. Warmed by the feed, never cold‑pitched. These are lower‑end figures. A list as small and precise as yours costs more per 1,000 and per click. That's the price of reaching only the names that matter.
CHANNEL 03 · THE LONG GAME
People buy you. Not the logo.
Your industry watches its competitors closely. When a peer moves, they move. So we build both founders' brands the way our team builds Andrew's. Content across LinkedIn, YouTube and more. None of your time.
We run your profiles
A media team for two founders. Posts, videos and engagement, planned and published for you.
A content engine, zero hours
The same workflow behind Andrew's TikTok, YouTube and LinkedIn, pointed at your audience.
Competitor FOMO
“Your rival just launched this.” A traditional buyer who lives on LinkedIn moves when they see a peer ahead.
A traditional crowd, but a heavy LinkedIn one. We show up where they already scroll.
THE JOURNEY
One prospect. Many touches. Zero chasing.
Sixty sits either side of the call too. Prospect research before, follow‑up and proposal after. You just show up and sell.
Awareness
Feed + organic
Your content lives on their feed and timeline.
Interest
Report + video
They download the doc and watch a video made for them.
Connection
DM + landing page
A soft LinkedIn connect and their own page to book.
Warm follow
WhatsApp
A short personal video, never cold, only after the connect.
The call
Booked
The first lead you see is a prospect ready to talk.
After
Proposal + pipeline
Follow‑up, proposal and pipeline tracked for you.

HOW WE START
Prove it in 14 days. Scale it in 90.
Weeks 1 to 2
The video sprint
200 personalised videos live. First positive replies. We shape your Lassi offer together.
Weeks 3 to 6
Warm the feed
Turn on paid + the gated report. Warm a B‑list. Find the message that clicks.
Weeks 7 to 12
Layer organic
Build both brands. Split‑test ICPs and offers. Double down on what books calls.
Day 90
A proven funnel
Your numbers, the winning message, and a clear decision on what to scale.
Positive reply› Enough replies› At the right cost› Systematised
YOUR OFFER · DON'T SELL THE TOOL
Give them a room, not a free trial.
A public free trial devalues Lassi, and your market is too small to fund the spend behind one. Make it exclusive and scarce instead. The kind of offer a buyer can't refuse.
The “first 100”
“We're opening Lassi to the first 100 distributors. Free for three months. All we ask is a case study. Fifteen minutes?”
Competitor FOMO
“Your competitor just put this live. I thought of you. Want to see it before they get ahead?”
Sell the value and the connection, not the subscription. Get them in the room first.
